_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to transfer and adapt skills and strategies from past experiences to create successful outcomes in new situations.

_source.w: We are learning to transfer and adapt skills and strategies from past experiences to create successful outcomes in new situations.
y: Transfer and adaptation are hallmarks of truly versatile, skilled movers.
Drawing on past experience accelerates learning in new contexts.
This skill prepares us for the variety of physical challenges we will encounter throughout life.
eg: Applying strategies learned in one sport to a different sport with similar tactical demands.
Adapting skills from training to competitive game situations.
Transferring leadership and teamwork skills from physical activity to other contexts.
Identifying which past experiences are most relevant to a new challenge.
Discussing how adaptability and transfer are valued in elite sport.
Reflecting on how our past experiences have prepared us for a recent physical challenge.
